perturbation.original_text: Charity Tunes shall make its music catalogue available to the purchasers in MP3 file format to the fullest extent that such format is available to Charity Tunes pursuant to any agreements in effect between Charity Tunes and its wholesalers on the date of this Agreement. Accordingly, Charity Tunes shall use its best efforts to update its music catalogue with available MP3 files by June 30, 2009.
perturbation.changed_text: Charity Tunes shall make its music catalogue available to the purchasers in MP3 file format to the fullest extent that such format is available to Charity Tunes pursuant to any agreements in effect between Charity Tunes and its wholesalers on the date of this Agreement. Accordingly, Charity Tunes may, at its discretion, update its music catalogue with available MP3 files by June 30, 2009.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states 'Charity Tunes shall use its best efforts to update its music catalogue,' implying an obligation. The modified text replaces 'shall use its best efforts' with 'may, at its discretion,' changing the obligation to a voluntary action. This introduces a contradiction in terms of Charity Tunes' commitment to updating the catalogue. This is contradicting to the later part where 'The Charity Tunes system used for redemption of downloads will ensure that (i) downloads are obtained under the Promotion only by way of redemption of eligible Pin Codes and only up to the maximum number of music downloads per Pin Code set out at paragraph 3 above'
perturbation.contradicted_text: The Charity Tunes system used for redemption of downloads will ensure that (i) downloads are obtained under the Promotion only by way of redemption of eligible Pin Codes and only up to the maximum number of music downloads per Pin Code set out at paragraph 3 above, (ii) otherwise eligible Pin Codes are invalidated once they have been used to download their respective per Pin Code maximum, and (iii) the total maximum download limits described herein are observed.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'shall use its best efforts' to 'may, at its discretion' weakens Charity Tunes' obligation to update the music catalogue. However, the contradicted text focuses on the system's function of managing downloads based on Pin Codes. The weakened obligation to update the catalogue does not directly contradict the system's function of ensuring proper download management. The contradiction is not strong enough to cause unenforceability or confusion regarding the Pin Code download system. The changed text and contradicted text do not create a clear and direct conflict.

perturbation.original_text: Sponsor agrees that it will not increase the list price to its customers of Designated Sponsor Products that form part of this promotion as compared to its otherwise identical products that do not form part of the promotion.
perturbation.changed_text: Sponsor may, at its discretion, adjust the list price to its customers of Designated Sponsor Products that form part of this promotion, notwithstanding the price of its otherwise identical products that do not form part of the promotion.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that 'Sponsor agrees that it will not increase the list price to its customers', creating an obligation. The modified text replaces this with 'Sponsor may, at its discretion, adjust the list price', essentially allowing them to increase the price. The Sponsor may modify the prices, that in in-text contradiction to the first section where it states that 'Designated Sponsor Products sold by Sponsor with the Promotion offer may not be sold at a higher list price than the same (or substantially similar) product(s) that do not contain the Promotion offer.'
perturbation.contradicted_text: Designated Sponsor Products sold by Sponsor with the Promotion offer may not be sold at a higher list price than the same (or substantially similar) product(s) that do not contain the Promotion offer.
perturbation.justification: The original text prevents the sponsor from increasing the price of designated sponsor products in the promotion, establishing a clear obligation. The changed text then allows the sponsor, at its discretion, to adjust the list price, directly contradicting the initial restriction. This directly conflicts with the 'Contradicted Text' which states 'Designated Sponsor Products sold by Sponsor with the Promotion offer may not be sold at a higher list price than the same (or substantially similar) product(s) that do not contain the Promotion offer,' causing a clear and impactful inconsistency regarding pricing obligations.

perturbation.original_text: Charity Tunes warrants that, subject only to any limitation or condition specified in this Agreement, it will provide immediately to any consumer entitled to a music download in connection with a Pin Code the music download selected by that consumer.
perturbation.changed_text: Charity Tunes endeavours to provide, subject to reasonable limitations and conditions deemed necessary by Charity Tunes, a music download to any consumer presenting a valid Pin Code. The fulfillment of this download is not guaranteed.
perturbation.explanation: The original text uses 'warrants' and 'it will provide immediately', creating a clear obligation. The modified text replaces this with 'endeavours to provide' and 'is not guaranteed', making the provision of the download non-obligatory and uncertain. This creates an in-text contradiction with the section outlining the consequences of failing to provide a download. In the section 11.2 it states that 'If for any reason Charity Tunes fails to provide a music download to a consumer in accordance with clause 11.1, thereby breaching its warranty thereunder, it shall'. However, in the added perturbation, is states that the 'fulfillment of this download is not guaranteed', which is making the section 11.2, contradictory and creating uncertainty in enforcement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: If for any reason Charity Tunes fails to provide a music download to a consumer in accordance with clause 11.1, thereby breaching its warranty thereunder, it shall: (i) forthwith remedy that failure by providing the requested download to that consumer as soon as possible; (ii) forthwith provide notice to Sponsor of the failure to immediately provide the download, including the date, time and other details of the failure, and of the steps being taken forthwith to remedy the failure; and (iii) once the failure has been remedied by Charity Tunes, forthwith provide Sponsor with notice of same.
perturbation.justification: The original text established a warranty obligation for Charity Tunes to provide music downloads. The changed text replaces this with a non-guaranteed endeavor. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which outlines the consequences of breaching the warranty by failing to provide a download. The contradicted text assumes a guaranteed provision, while the changed text explicitly states the fulfillment is not guaranteed, making enforcement of the warranty (and thus the remedies outlined in the contradicted text) uncertain and creating a strong in-text contradiction. The change breaks the original warranty obligation making the failure remedies unenforceable.
